key_insights.text: France and Austria focused journey blending iconic cities with alpine landscapes
Birthday celebration in Paris with a rooftop Eiffel Tower dinner at Les Ombres
Best photos at Trocadéro, Pont Alexandre III, Hallstatt Skywalk, and Gosausee
Spring weather varies from mild cities to cool Alps—pack layers and waterproofs
Austrian road trip through Salzkammergut is a major highlight—start early for parking
Advance rail bookings and city cards help manage costs
Pack light due to frequent hotel changes and train travel
Early departures and timed entries require night-before preparation
